title: 31 sloths die in Florida before opening of attraction
description: Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.

title: Witkoff, Kushner to take part in second round of Iran peace talks in Pakistan
description: While the U.S. sends representatives to Islamabad, Israel's fight with Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
description: In her first interview since being deported, Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, the French widow of a former G.I., recounted her experience in ICE detention.

title: Fed up Venice Beach residents mock city’s homeless cleanup charade
description: City crews and outreach teams returned to the area near Hampton Drive and Rose Avenue, where makeshift shelters had reappeared after earlier Inside Safe operations relocated more than 100 people indoors.

title: Lakers beat Kevin Durant-less Rockets in Game 3, take 3-0 lead in series
description: Lakers coach JJ Redick had a clear message before his team’s Game 3 first round playoff series matchup against the Rockets on Friday night.

title: The 10 best players available for Day 3 of 2026 NFL Draft
description: Here is a scouting report on each, including their original rank in The Post’s Top 75 Big Board in parentheses.
